{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "By “Clean this up,” do you want (A) sentence-level polish only (grammar, clarity, concision) without changing structure or claims, (B) polish plus light section-level reordering and softening/aligning claims to avoid overstatement, or (C) a deeper rewrite that may reframe the argument and restructure the section?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request most naturally maps to sentence- and paragraph-level editing to improve clarity, flow, and concision without changing content.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should preserve appropriate uncertainty and not imply stronger certainty than the reported results support.",
    "RX.2": "Language must avoid overstating performance or generality relative to what the artifact claims.",
    "RX.3": "Work must adhere to the requested scope of ‘clean up’ and avoid expanding into re-analysis unless authorized.",
    "RX.4": "Edits should not introduce phrasing that could lead to harmful misinterpretation of the results or methods.",
    "RX.5": "All references to strategies, markets, and Table 1 must be preserved to maintain provenance and traceability."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: By “Clean this up,” do you want (A) sentence-level polish only (grammar, clarity, concision) without changing structure or claims, (B) polish plus light section-level reordering and softening/aligning claims to avoid overstatement, or (C) a deeper rewrite that may reframe the argument and restructure the section?

rationale.R1.6: The request most naturally maps to sentence- and paragraph-level editing to improve clarity, flow, and concision without changing content.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should preserve appropriate uncertainty and not imply stronger certainty than the reported results support.
rationale.RX.2: Language must avoid overstating performance or generality relative to what the artifact claims.
rationale.RX.3: Work must adhere to the requested scope of ‘clean up’ and avoid expanding into re-analysis unless authorized.
rationale.RX.4: Edits should not introduce phrasing that could lead to harmful misinterpretation of the results or methods.
rationale.RX.5: All references to strategies, markets, and Table 1 must be preserved to maintain provenance and traceability.
